title: potentilla chrysantha
intro: Potentilla chrysantha, also known as Korean potentilla or golden pot, is a perennial plant species native to East Asia, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and deciduous foliage. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Potentilla chrysantha include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, Potentilla chrysantha is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
